_note: Per-page voice OVERRIDES only. Every other page gets a deterministic persona derived from its page_id in lib/persona.js. Keys are page_id -> partial persona {archetype, tone, emoji, length, questionStyle, person}. The two brand/community pages speak as 'we', not a single persona.
